responsibilities: Architect scalable, fault-tolerant data platforms that support petabyte-scale batch and streaming workloads
Lead the design and implementation of data lakehouse architectures using Apache Iceberg and Delta Lake

Drive major infrastructure initiatives such as data platform migrations and warehouse modernization projects
